_primary_source: Primary source: (Shoeb, 2009) MIT PhD thesis, CHB-MIT Scalp EEG Database; (Goldberger, 2000) DOI 10.1161/01.CIR.101.23.e215 PhysioNet; (Soffer, 1986) DOI 10.1364/OL.11.000118 phase-conjugate associative memory.
title: QA_EEG_PHASE_CONJUGATE_RECALL_CERT.v1
description: Fixture schema for QA Phase-Conjugate EEG Brain-State Recall Cert [520]. 'mechanism' fixtures certify the phase-lock-vs-naive mechanism on synthetic data; 'empirical' fixtures record real-CHB-MIT per-patient results with provenance.

probe_label.description: mechanism: true class of the probe

global_phi.description: mechanism: global artifact shift on the probe

expected_naive_class.description: mechanism: class naive classification returns (may be wrong under phi)

expected_phase_locked_class.description: mechanism: class phase-locked classification returns (must equal probe_label)
